<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><b><span
style='font-size:28.0pt'>ÎBRANÎ BO KURMANCAN</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><b><span
style='font-size:24.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1506;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1514;</span></b><b><span
style='font-size:24.0pt'> </span></b><b><span style='font-size:24.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1491;&#1493;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;</span></b><b><span
style='font-size:24.0pt'> </span></b><span class=SpellE><b><span
style='font-size:24.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1511;&#1493;&#1512;&#1502;&#1504;&#1490;</span></b><b><span
style='font-size:24.0pt'>'</span></b><b><span style='font-size:24.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1497;</span></b></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><span class=SpellE><b><span
style='font-size:20.0pt;color:#4472C4'>Îbranî</span></b></span><b><span
style='font-size:20.0pt;color:#4472C4'> ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span
class=SpellE>Axêverên</span> <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><span class=SpellE><span
style='font-size:14.0pt'>Pirtûkeke</span></span><span style='font-size:14.0pt'>
<span class=SpellE>Destpêkê</span> <span class=SpellE>ya</span> Temam di 21 <span
class=SpellE>Be&#351;an</span> de</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#666666'>Tê</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#666666'> de: <span
class=SpellE>Diyalogên</span> <span class=SpellE>Rew&#351;an</span> | <span
class=SpellE>Ferheng</span> | <span class=SpellE>Temrînên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Wergêranê</span></span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><span lang=DE
style='color:#444444;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ji hêla Brett Goldberg û Reuven
Koret ve</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<span lang=DE style='font-size:12.0pt;font-family:"Arial",sans-serif;
mso-fareast-font-family:Arial;mso-ansi-language:DE;mso-fareast-language:EN-GB;
mso-bidi-language:AR-SA'><br clear=all style='mso-special-character:line-break;
page-break-before:always'>
</span>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<h1><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Destpêk / </span><span
class=SpellE>&#1502;&#1489;&#1493;&#1488;</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:
DE'><o:p></o:p></span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Hûn hatine xêr!
Ev pirtûk ji bo axêverên Kurmancî hatiye amadekirin da ku zimanê Îbranî
bixwînin û fêr bibin. Îbranî zimanekî kevnare û zindî ye, ku îro li Îsraêlê
wekî zimanê fermî tê bikaranîn.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=GramE>.<span class=SpellE><span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1512;&#1493;&#1499;&#1497;&#1501;</span></span></span>
<span class=SpellE><span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1489;&#1488;&#1497;&#1501;</span></span>!
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1505;&#1508;&#1512;</span> <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1494;&#1492;</span> <span style='mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1502;&#1497;&#1493;&#1506;&#1491;</span> <span style='mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1500;&#1491;&#1493;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;</span> <span class=SpellE><span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1511;&#1493;&#1512;&#1502;&#1504;&#1490;</span>'<span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1497;</span></span> <span style='mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1492;&#1512;&#1493;&#1510;&#1497;&#1501;</span> <span style='mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1500;&#1500;&#1502;&#1493;&#1491;</span> <span class=SpellE><span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1506;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1514;</span></span>.
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1506;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1514;</span>

<p class=MsoNormal>Ev <span class=SpellE>pirtûk</span> 20 <span class=SpellE>be&#351;</span>

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 1: <span class=SpellE>Elîfbêya</span> <span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>vê</span>
<span class=SpellE>be&#351;ê</span> de <span class=SpellE>em</span> ê <span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Tênxist</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>: Hin <span class=SpellE>tîp</span> du form <span
class=SpellE>hene</span> — forma <span class=SpellE>asayî</span> û forma <span
class=SpellE>dawiya</span> <span class=SpellE>peyvê</span> (<span class=SpellE>mîna</span>
&#1499;/&#1498;, &#1502;/&#1501;, &#1504;/&#1503;, &#1508;/&#1507;, &#1510;/&#1509;).
Forma <span class=SpellE>duyem</span> <span class=SpellE>tenê</span> li <span
class=SpellE>dawiya</span> <span class=SpellE>peyvan</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>
<span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;a</span> 1.2 — <span class=SpellE>Dengdêr</span>:
<span class=SpellE>Nikud</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1504;&#1497;&#1511;&#1493;&#1491;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>dengdêr</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span
class=SpellE>nî&#351;anên</span> <span class=SpellE>piçûk</span> <span
class=SpellE>ên</span> <span class=SpellE>jêr</span> an <span class=SpellE>jora</span>
<span class=SpellE>tîpan</span> <span class=SpellE>tên</span> <span
class=SpellE>nî&#351;ankirin</span>. Van <span class=SpellE>nî&#351;anan</span>
'<span class=SpellE>nikud</span>' (<span class=SpellE>&#1504;&#1497;&#1511;&#1493;&#1491;</span>)
<span class=SpellE>dibêjin</span>. Di <span class=SpellE>pirtûkên</span> <span
class=SpellE>xwendekaran</span>, <span class=SpellE>Tewrat</span> û <span
class=SpellE>ferhengên</span> <span class=SpellE>zarokan</span> de <span
class=SpellE>tên</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.</span></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;a</span> 1.4 — <span class=SpellE>Rêzimana</span>
<span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 1: <span class=SpellE>Alîyê</span> <span
class=SpellE>Nivîsandinê</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Îbranî</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> ji <span class=SpellE>rastê</span> <span
class=SpellE>ber</span> bi <span class=SpellE>çepê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>
<span class=SpellE>nivîsandin</span> (<span class=SpellE>mîna</span> <span
class=SpellE>Erebî</span>). Gava <span class=SpellE>ku</span> du <span
class=SpellE>zimanên</span> <span class=SpellE>cuda</span> di <span
class=SpellE>hevokekê</span> de <span class=SpellE>werin</span> <span
class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span> — <span class=SpellE>mîna</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> û <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> — <span
class=SpellE>aliyê</span> <span class=SpellE>nivîsandinê</span> <span
class=SpellE>diguhere</span>. Ev <span class=SpellE>jê</span> re '<span
class=SpellE>bidireksiyon</span>' (du <span class=SpellE>alî</span>) <span
class=SpellE>dibêjin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>dema</span>
<span class=SpellE>xwendina</span> Îbranî de <span class=SpellE>gava</span> <span
class=SpellE>tîpek</span> <span class=SpellE>nasnakirî</span> be, ji <span
class=SpellE>navê</span> <span class=SpellE>wê</span> <span class=SpellE>dest</span>
<span class=SpellE>pê</span> bike. <span class=SpellE>Mînak</span>: &#1489; =
'Bet' — <span class=SpellE>deng</span> 'b' e.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Spartek</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1513;&#1497;&#1506;&#1493;&#1512;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Rêwerzên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>wergêranê</span>: Van <span

<span class=SpellE>bidin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>1. <span class=SpellE>Tîpa</span>
'&#351;' <span class=SpellE>ya</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> (&#1513;)
di du <span class=SpellE>awayan</span> de <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span

wan <span class=SpellE>binivîsin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>3. <span class=SpellE>Peyvên</span>
<span class=SpellE>jêrîn</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>4. <span class=SpellE>Alfabeya</span>

<span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>xwendin</span>?</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>5. <span class=SpellE>Çend</span>

lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Bîst û sê salên min hene. </span>Tu?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1462;&#1468;&#1503;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1506;&#1462;&#1513;&#1456;&#1474;&#1512;&#1460;&#1497;&#1501;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1493;&#1456;&#1513;&#1464;&#1473;&#1500;&#1493;&#1465;&#1513;&#1473;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>. </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1493;&#1456;&#1488;&#1463;&#1514;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span lang=DE
style='color:#2E7D32;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ani ben esrim ve&#351;alo&#351;.
Ve'ata?</span></i><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Arya: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Min bîst û yek salên min hene. Tu li ku
dijî?<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1493;&#1456;&#1488;&#1462;&#1495;&#1464;&#1491;</span><span

lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1490;&#1464;&#1468;&#1512;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span lang=DE
style='color:#2E7D32;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ani ben esrim ve'exad. Eyfo ata gar?</span></i><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Dani: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ez li Kurdistanê dijim. Hêvî dikim em dîsa
bibin hev!<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>. </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1511;&#1463;&#1493;&#1462;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 1: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>bûn</span>» û <span class=SpellE>Cînavkên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kesî</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>lêkera</span> «<span class=SpellE>bûn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de bi <span
class=SpellE>vî</span> <span class=SpellE>awayî</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>
<span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>: <span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span
class=SpellE>im</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>yî</span>,
<span class=SpellE>ew</span> e, <span class=SpellE>em</span> in, <span
class=SpellE>hûn</span> in, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> in. <span
class=SpellE>Mînak</span>: «Ez <span class=SpellE>ba&#351;</span> <span
class=SpellE>im</span>» û «Tu li <span class=SpellE>ku</span> <span
class=SpellE><span class=GramE>yî</span></span><span class=GramE>?»</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Cînavkên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>kesî</span> <span class=SpellE>yên</span>
<span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> <span class=SpellE>ev</span> in: <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> (min), <span class=SpellE>tu</span> (<span class=SpellE>te</span>),
<span class=SpellE>ew</span> (<span class=SpellE>wî</span>/<span class=SpellE>wê</span>),
<span class=SpellE>em</span> (me), <span class=SpellE>hûn</span> (we), <span
class=SpellE>ew</span> (wan). Forma <span class=SpellE>yekem</span> ji <span
class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>mijarê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>
<span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>; forma <span class=SpellE>duyem</span> ji <span
class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>ti&#351;ta</span> <span class=SpellE>lêkerên</span>
<span class=SpellE>gerguhêz</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span
class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Pirsa</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>çawa</span></span><span
class=GramE>?»</span> ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>pirskirina</span>
<span class=SpellE>halê</span> <span class=SpellE>kesekî</span> <span
class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>. </span><span
lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Bersiva asayî: «Ez
ba&#351; im, spas» an «Ne xirab e».</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:
DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ji
bo xatirxwestinê: «Xwedahafiz» wekî «Xudê te bibe nîgehdar» tê bikaranîn. </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de <span
class=SpellE>hevwateya</span> <span class=SpellE>wê</span> «<span class=SpellE>&#1500;&#1456;&#1492;&#1460;&#1514;&#1456;&#1512;&#1464;&#1488;&#1493;&#1465;&#1514;</span>»
(<span class=SpellE>lehitraot</span>) e.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Spartek</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1513;&#1497;&#1506;&#1493;&#1512;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwerzên</b></span><b> <span
class=SpellE>wergêranê</span>: Van <span class=SpellE>hevokên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
<span class=SpellE>wergerînin</span>.</b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo3'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>1.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span><span class=SpellE>Navê</span> min Arya ye.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo3'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>2.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Tu <span class=SpellE>çawa</span> <span class=SpellE>yî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo3'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>3.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Ez <span class=SpellE>ba&#351;</span> <span class=SpellE>im</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo3'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>4.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1490;&#1464;&#1468;&#1491;&#1493;&#1465;&#1500;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 2: <span class=SpellE>Xwedîtî</span>
û <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span> «<span class=SpellE>hebûn</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>xwedîtî</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span
class=SpellE>pa&#351;girên</span> <span class=SpellE>cînavkên</span> <span
class=SpellE>xwedîtiyê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>nî&#351;andan</span>:
<span class=SpellE>malbata</span> min, <span class=SpellE>malbata</span> <span
class=SpellE>te</span>, <span class=SpellE>malbata</span> <span class=SpellE>wî</span>/<span
class=SpellE>wê</span>, <span class=SpellE>malbata</span> me, <span
class=SpellE>malbata</span> we, <span class=SpellE>malbata</span> wan.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>hebûn</span>» ji <span
class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>nî&#351;andana</span> <span
class=SpellE>hebûnê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.
«<span class=SpellE>Birayên</span> min <span class=SpellE>hene</span>» û «<span
class=SpellE>Xwi&#351;ka</span> min <span class=SpellE>nîne</span>» (<span
class=SpellE>neyînî</span>).</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Rengdêrên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>mezin</span>» û «<span
class=SpellE>biçûk</span>» di <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> de ji <span
class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>temenî</span> <span class=SpellE>jî</span>
<span class=SpellE>tên</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>: «<span
class=SpellE>Ew</span> ji min <span class=SpellE>mezintir</span> e».</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>xwedîtî</span> bi «</span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1462;&#1473;&#1500;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>» <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>nî&#351;andan</span>:
«</span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1502;</span></span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1460;&#1468;&#1513;&#1456;&#1473;&#1508;&#1464;&#1468;&#1495;&#1464;&#1492;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1513;&#1462;&#1473;&#1500;&#1460;&#1468;&#1497;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>» = <span class=SpellE>malbata</span> min.</span></p>

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 4: <span class=SpellE>Jimare</span> / <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1505;&#1508;&#1512;&#1497;&#1501;</span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Muallim: </b>Em ê <span class=SpellE>îro</span> <span
class=SpellE>jimaran</span> <span class=SpellE>fêr</span> <span class=SpellE>bibin</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1497;&#1468;&#1493;&#1465;&#1501;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1504;&#1460;&#1500;&#1456;&#1502;&#1463;&#1491;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1460;&#1505;&#1456;&#1508;&#1464;&#1468;&#1512;&#1460;&#1497;&#1501;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Hayom <span class=SpellE>nilmad</span> <span
class=SpellE>misparim</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>&#350;agirt</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Yek</span>, du, <span class=SpellE>sê</span>, <span class=SpellE>çar</span>,
<span class=SpellE>pênc</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1495;&#1463;&#1514;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1456;&#1473;&#1514;&#1463;&#1468;&#1497;&#1460;&#1501;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1464;&#1473;&#1500;&#1493;&#1465;&#1513;&#1473;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1512;&#1456;&#1489;&#1463;&#1468;&#1506;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1495;&#1464;&#1502;&#1461;&#1513;&#1473;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Axat</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#2E7D32'>, <span
class=SpellE>&#351;tayim</span>, <span class=SpellE>&#351;alo&#351;</span>, <span
class=SpellE>arba</span>, <span class=SpellE>xame&#351;</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Muallim: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ba&#351; e! &#350;e&#351;, heft,
he&#351;t, neh, deh.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1510;&#1493;&#1468;&#1497;&#1464;&#1468;&#1503;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>! </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 5: <span class=SpellE>Lêkerên</span>
«<span class=SpellE>xwarin</span>» û «<span class=SpellE>vexwarin</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkerên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>xwarin</span>» û «<span
class=SpellE>vexwarin</span>» ji <span class=SpellE>lêkerên</span> <span
class=SpellE>bingehîn</span> <span class=SpellE>yên</span> <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span>
ne. Di <span class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de <span
class=SpellE>pê&#351;gira</span> «di-» li wan <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span
class=SpellE>zêdekirin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>rew&#351;a</span>
<span class=SpellE>neyînî</span> de <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;gira</span> «<span
class=SpellE>na</span>-» li <span class=SpellE>&#351;ûna</span> «di-» <span
class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
<span class=SpellE>naxwim</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span
class=SpellE>navexwî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>naxwe</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de: «</span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1500;&#1462;&#1488;&#1457;&#1499;&#1465;&#1500;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>» = <span class=SpellE>xwarin</span> û «</span><span
class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1460;&#1513;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1456;&#1473;<span class=SpellE>&#1514;&#1468;&#1493;&#1465;&#1514;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>» = <span class=SpellE>vexwarin</span>. Ev <span
class=SpellE>lêker</span> di <span class=SpellE>dawiya</span> <span
class=SpellE>hevokê</span> de <span class=SpellE>wekî</span> <span
class=SpellE>tevdeyî</span> <span class=SpellE>tên</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Gava <span class=SpellE>em</span>
<span class=SpellE>bipirsin</span> <span class=SpellE>çi</span> <span
class=SpellE>dixwe</span>: «Tu <span class=SpellE>çi</span> <span class=SpellE>dixwazî</span>
<span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>bixwî</span></span><span class=GramE>?»</span>
— «<span class=SpellE>bixwî</span>» <span class=SpellE>rengê</span> <span
class=SpellE>kilasîk</span> ê «<span class=SpellE>xwarin</span>» e di banga <span
class=SpellE>daxwazê</span> de.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Spartek</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1513;&#1497;&#1506;&#1493;&#1512;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwerzên</b></span><b> <span
class=SpellE>wergêranê</span>: Van <span class=SpellE>hevokên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
<span class=SpellE>wergerînin</span>.</b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>1.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Ez <span class=SpellE>birçî</span> me, <span class=SpellE>tu</span>
<span class=SpellE>ti&#351;tekî</span> <span class=SpellE>xwarinê</span> <span
class=SpellE>dixwazî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>2.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Nan û <span class=SpellE>penîr</span> <span class=SpellE>xwe&#351;</span>
in.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>3.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Ez <span class=SpellE>çay</span> <span class=SpellE>vexwim</span>.</p>

mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>4.<span

<span class=SpellE>dixwin</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>5.<span

mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>6.<span

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo7'><![if !supportLists]><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:

style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Fêkî ji bo tenduristiyê ba&#351; e.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 6: <span class=SpellE>Pirskirina</span>
<span class=SpellE>Biha</span> û <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span> «<span
class=SpellE>kirîn</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>pirskirina</span> <span class=SpellE>biha</span> di <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> de: «<span class=SpellE>Biha</span> <span
class=SpellE>çend</span> <span class=GramE>e?»</span> an «Ev <span
class=SpellE>çend</span> <span class=GramE>dike?»</span>. Di <span
class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de: «&#1499;&#1463;&#1468;&#1502;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;
<span class=SpellE>&#1494;&#1462;&#1492;</span> <span class=SpellE><span
class=GramE>&#1506;&#1493;&#1465;&#1500;&#1462;&#1492;</span></span><span
class=GramE>?»</span></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>kirîn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
<span class=SpellE>dikirîm</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span
class=SpellE>dikirî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>dikire</span>,
<span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>dikirin</span>. </span><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-ansi-language:DE'>Di dema borî de avahiya ergatîf tê: min kir, te kir,
wî/wê kir...</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Di
Kurmancî de rengdêr pi&#351;tî navdêr tên: «kincê &#351;în», «sêva sor». Di
Îbranî de jî rengdêr pi&#351;tî navdêr tên.</span><span lang=DE
style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Navendên
bazarê li Îsraêlê «&#351;uk» (</span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:
11.0pt'>&#1513;&#1473;&#1493;&#1468;&#1511;</span></span><span lang=DE

lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 8: <span class=SpellE>Rê</span> û <span

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwî</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Bibore</span>, <span class=SpellE>nexwe&#351;xane</span> li <span
class=SpellE>ku</span> ye?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1505;&#1456;&#1500;&#1460;&#1497;&#1495;&#1464;&#1492;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1461;&#1497;&#1508;&#1465;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1461;&#1468;&#1497;&#1514;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1495;&#1493;&#1465;&#1500;&#1460;&#1497;&#1501;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Slixa</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#2E7D32'>, <span
class=SpellE>eyfo</span> <span class=SpellE>beyt</span> <span class=SpellE>haxolim</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Ni&#351;tecî</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Rêya</span> <span class=SpellE>rast</span> <span class=SpellE>bigire</span>,
<span class=SpellE>pa&#351;ê</span> <span class=SpellE>çep</span> <span
class=SpellE>bikive</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1461;&#1498;&#1456;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1497;&#1464;&#1513;&#1464;&#1473;&#1512;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1495;&#1463;&#1512;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1499;&#1464;&#1468;&#1498;&#1456;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1508;&#1456;&#1468;&#1504;&#1461;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1456;&#1474;&#1502;&#1465;&#1488;&#1500;&#1464;&#1492;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Lex <span class=SpellE>ya&#351;ar</span>, <span
class=SpellE>axar</span> <span class=SpellE>kax</span> <span class=SpellE>pne</span>
<span class=SpellE>smo'la</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwî</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Dûr</span> e?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1494;&#1462;&#1492;</span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1512;&#1464;&#1495;&#1493;&#1465;&#1511;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ze <span class=SpellE>raxok</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Ni&#351;tecî</b></span><b>: </b>Na, <span
class=SpellE>nêzik</span> e. <span class=SpellE>Pênc</span> <span class=SpellE>dekeyan</span>
e.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 7: <span class=SpellE>Fermaniya</span>
<span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span> «<span class=SpellE>çûn</span>» û <span
class=SpellE>Pê&#351;dirên</span> <span class=SpellE>Cihê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Fermanî</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> «<span class=SpellE>tu</span>»:
<span class=SpellE>riya</span> <span class=SpellE>rast</span> <span
class=SpellE><span class=GramE>bigire</span></span><span class=GramE>!,</span> <span
class=SpellE>çep</span> <span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>bikive</span></span><span
class=GramE>!,</span> <span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>bi&#351;o</span></span><span
class=GramE>!.</span> <span class=SpellE>Fermaniya</span> <span class=SpellE>pirjimar</span>
«<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>» <span class=SpellE>pa&#351;gira</span> «-n» <span
class=SpellE>distîne</span>: <span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>biçin</span></span><span
class=GramE>!,</span> <span class=SpellE>bêjin</span>!</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Pê&#351;dirên</span></span><span

<span class=SpellE>sereke</span>: li, di ... de, ser, bin, <span class=SpellE>ber</span>,
<span class=SpellE>pê&#351;</span>, <span class=SpellE>pa&#351;</span>, <span

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1497;&#1464;&#1499;&#1493;&#1465;&#1500;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1464;&#1514;&#1461;&#1514;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1462;&#1495;&#1464;&#1491;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>More, <span class=SpellE>ha'et</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;eli</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#351;avur</span>. Ata <span class=SpellE>yaxol</span> <span
class=SpellE>latet</span> li <span class=SpellE>exad</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Mamoste: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Erê, em in. Binivîse: «Ez xwendekar im û
ez fêr dibim.»<span style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span></span>(<span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1499;&#1461;&#1468;&#1503;</span>, <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1461;&#1512;&#1461;&#1497;</span> <span
class=SpellE><span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1456;&#1498;</span></span><span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1464;</span>. <span style='mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1499;&#1456;&#1468;<span class=SpellE>&#1514;&#1493;&#1465;&#1489;</span></span>:
«<span class=SpellE><span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span></span>
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1514;&#1463;&#1468;&#1500;&#1456;&#1502;&#1460;&#1497;&#1491;</span>
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1493;&#1463;&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE><span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1493;&#1465;&#1502;&#1461;&#1491;</span></span><span
class=GramE>.»</span>)</p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Xwendekar</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Nivîsand</span>! <span class=SpellE>Mamoste</span>, «<span
class=SpellE>fêr</span> <span class=SpellE>bûn</span>» <span class=SpellE>çawa</span>
<span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>gotin</span> <span
class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>?<span
style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span>(&#1499;&#1464;&#1468;<span class=SpellE>&#1514;&#1463;&#1489;&#1456;&#1514;</span>&#1460;&#1468;&#1497;!
<span class=SpellE>&#1502;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;&#1462;&#1492;</span>, <span
class=SpellE>&#1488;&#1461;&#1497;&#1498;</span>&#1456; <span class=SpellE>&#1488;&#1493;&#1465;&#1502;&#1456;&#1512;&#1460;&#1497;&#1501;</span>
«<span class=SpellE>&#1500;&#1460;&#1500;&#1456;&#1502;&#1465;&#1491;</span>» &#1489;&#1456;&#1468;<span
class=SpellE>&#1506;&#1460;&#1489;&#1456;&#1512;&#1460;&#1497;&#1514;</span>?)</p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 8: <span class=SpellE>Lêkerên</span>
«<span class=SpellE>xwendin</span>» û «<span class=SpellE>nivîsîn</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkerên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>bingehîn</span> <span
class=SpellE>yên</span> <span class=SpellE>xwendin</span> û <span class=SpellE>nivîsandinê</span>
di <span class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de: <span
class=SpellE>xwendin</span> &#8594; <span class=SpellE>dixwînim</span>/<span
class=SpellE>dixwînî</span>/<span class=SpellE>dixwîne</span>/<span
class=SpellE>dixwînin</span>; <span class=SpellE>nivîsîn</span> &#8594; <span
class=SpellE>dinivîsim</span>/<span class=SpellE>dinivîsî</span>/<span
class=SpellE>dinivîse</span>/<span class=SpellE>dinivîsin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Tevdeyî
di Kurmancî de bi «-în» an «-in» dikede: xwendin, nivîsîn, fêrbûn. </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de <span
class=SpellE>tevdeyî</span> bi «</span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1460;</span><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>-» <span
class=SpellE>dest</span> <span class=SpellE>pê</span> dike: </span><span
class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1460;&#1500;&#1456;&#1502;&#1465;&#1491;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>, </span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:
11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1460;&#1499;&#1456;&#1514;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1465;&#1468;&#1489;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>«Ma <span class=SpellE>tu</span>
fam <span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>dikî</span></span><span class=GramE>?»</span>
— «Ma» <span class=SpellE>wekî</span> <span class=SpellE>nî&#351;aneya</span> <span
class=SpellE>pirsê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>bikaranîn</span>.
Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de «<span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>&#1492;&#1463;&#1488;&#1460;&#1501;</span></span><span
class=GramE>?»</span> <span class=SpellE>heman</span> <span class=SpellE>rola</span>
<span class=SpellE>pirsê</span> <span class=SpellE>dilîze</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Navdêrên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>sinifê</span>: <span class=SpellE>sinif</span>,
<span class=SpellE>sifrê</span>, <span class=SpellE>kursî</span>, mase, <span
class=SpellE>pirtûkxane</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:6.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
color:#375623'>Lêkera</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
color:#375623'> «<span class=SpellE>xwendin</span>» — Dema <span class=GramE>Niha<span
style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span>[</span>Dema <span class=GramE>Niha]<span
style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span>|</span><span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> 
</span><span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span>: <span class=SpellE><span
class=GramE>xwendin</span></span><span class=GramE><span
style='mso-spacerun:yes'>  </span>|</span><span style='mso-spacerun:yes'> 
</span><span class=SpellE>&#1506;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1514;</span>: <span
class=SpellE>&#1500;&#1460;&#1511;&#1456;&#1512;&#1465;&#1488;</span></span></b></p>

 style='width:300.0pt;border-collapse:collapse;border:none;mso-border-alt:solid #4472C4 .5pt;

 <tr style='mso-yfti-irow:0;mso-yfti-firstrow:yes'>
  <td width=133 valign=top style='width:100.0pt;border-top:#4472C4;border-left:
  #4472C4;border-bottom:#9DC3E6;border-right:#9DC3E6;border-style:solid;

  <p class=MsoNormal align=center style='text-align:center'><span class=SpellE><b><span
  style='font-size:10.0pt;color:black;mso-color-alt:windowtext'>Cînavk</span></b></span><b><span
  style='font-size:10.0pt;color:black;mso-color-alt:windowtext'> (<span

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 10: <span class=SpellE>Tenduristî</span>
/ <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1488;&#1493;&#1514;</span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Nexwe&#351;</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Doktor</span>, <span class=SpellE>serê</span> min ê min ê <span
class=SpellE>ê&#351;e</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1468;&#1493;&#1465;&#1511;&#1456;&#1496;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1464;&#1512;&#1465;&#1488;&#1513;&#1473;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1462;&#1473;&#1500;&#1460;&#1468;&#1497;</span><span

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;

class=SpellE>ê&#351;în</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 11: Kar û <span class=SpellE>Pî&#351;e</span>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Rêzan: </b><span class=SpellE>Karê</span> <span
class=SpellE>te</span> <span class=SpellE>çi</span> ye?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span

lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1462;&#1473;&#1500;&#1456;&#1468;&#1498;&#1464;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ma <span class=SpellE>ha'avoda</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;elxa</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Avî: </b>Ez <span class=SpellE>mamoste</span> me. Tu <span
class=SpellE>çi</span> <span class=SpellE>dixebilî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;&#1462;&#1492;</span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1463;&#1468;&#1502;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span

margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ani more. </span></i><i><span lang=DE style='color:#2E7D32;
mso-ansi-language:DE'>Bama ata oved?</span></i><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Rêzan: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ez derzîvan im li spîtalê.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

style='color:#2E7D32'>Ani <span class=SpellE>ax</span> <span class=SpellE>bebeyt</span>
<span class=SpellE>haxolim</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Avî: </b><span class=SpellE>Karê</span> <span
class=SpellE>te</span> <span class=SpellE>giring</span> e. <span class=SpellE>Çikas</span>
<span class=SpellE>demê</span> <span class=SpellE>dixebilî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ha'avoda</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#2E7D32'>
<span class=SpellE>&#351;elxa</span> <span class=SpellE>xa&#351;uva</span>.

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Rêzan: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>He&#351;t seetan di rojê de.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 10: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>xebitîn</span>» û <span class=SpellE>Pî&#351;eyan</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>xebitîn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
<span class=SpellE>dixebitim</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span
class=SpellE>dixebitî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>dixebite</span>,
<span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>dixebitin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>dema</span>
<span class=SpellE>borî</span> de <span class=SpellE>wekî</span> <span
class=SpellE>lêkera</span> <span class=SpellE>nederbaz</span>: <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>xebitîm</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span>
<span class=SpellE>xebitî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span
class=SpellE>xebit</span>, <span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span
class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>xebitin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Navên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>pî&#351;eyan</span> <span
class=SpellE>carinan</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>pa&#351;gira</span>
«-van» <span class=SpellE>têne</span>: <span class=SpellE>derzîvan</span>, <span
class=SpellE>gerîvan</span>. <span class=SpellE>Pî&#351;eyên</span> din: <span
class=SpellE>mamoste</span>, <span class=SpellE>doktor</span>, <span
class=SpellE>endezyar</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>pî&#351;eyan</span> ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span
class=SpellE>nêr</span> û <span class=SpellE>mê</span> <span class=SpellE>cûda</span>
ne: <span class=SpellE>&#1502;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;&#1462;&#1492;</span>/<span
class=SpellE>&#1502;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;&#1464;&#1492;</span> (<span
class=SpellE>mamoste</span>), <span class=SpellE>&#1512;&#1493;&#1465;&#1508;&#1461;&#1488;</span>/<span
class=SpellE>&#1512;&#1493;&#1465;&#1508;&#1456;&#1488;&#1464;&#1492;</span> (<span
class=SpellE>doktor</span>).</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Noa: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Pir ba&#351;! Em ê sibê seeat nehê sibê
herim bajarê Hayfayê bi hev re!<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1488;&#1465;&#1491;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1496;&#1493;&#1465;&#1489;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>! </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1464;&#1495;&#1464;&#1512;</span><span

lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>!</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span

<span class=SpellE>nelex</span> <span class=SpellE>lexeyfa</span> <span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 11: <span class=SpellE>Go&#351;tina</span>
<span class=SpellE>Wextê</span> û <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span> «<span
class=SpellE>hatin</span>»</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>go&#351;tina</span> <span class=SpellE>wextê</span>: «<span
class=SpellE>Seeat</span> <span class=SpellE>çend</span> <span class=GramE>e?»</span>
</span><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Bersiv:
«Seeat sê e» (3:00), «Seeat deh û nîv e» (10:30).</span><span lang=DE
style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Nîv
= nîv, çaryekê = çaryek: «Seeat sê û nîv» (3:30), «Seeat çar û çaryekî kêm»
(3:45).</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Lêkera
«hatin» di dema borî de: ez hatim, tu hatî, ew hat, em/hûn/ew hatin. Di niha
de: ez têm, tu têyî, ew tê, em/hûn/ew tên.</span><span lang=DE
style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ji
bo dema pê&#351;erojê di Kurmancî de «ê» pi&#351;tî cînavkê tê: ez ê biçim, tu
ê bêyî, ew ê bê.</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:6.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

color:#375623'>Lêkera</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:11.0pt;

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 13: <span class=SpellE>Bav</span> û Kul
/ <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1496;&#1489;&#1506;</span> <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1493;&#1502;&#1494;&#1490;</span> <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1493;&#1493;&#1497;&#1512;</span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Hivin</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Hewaya</span> <span class=SpellE>îro</span> <span class=SpellE>çawa</span>
ye?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1461;&#1497;&#1498;&#1456;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1462;&#1494;&#1462;&#1490;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1464;&#1488;&#1458;&#1493;&#1460;&#1497;&#1512;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1497;&#1468;&#1493;&#1465;&#1501;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span lang=DE
style='color:#2E7D32;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Ex mezeg ha'avir hayom?</span></i><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Arel: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Baran dibare. Li derve sar e.<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1490;&#1462;&#1468;&#1513;&#1462;&#1473;&#1501;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1497;&#1493;&#1465;&#1512;&#1461;&#1491;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>. </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1463;&#1468;&#1495;&#1493;&#1468;&#1509;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

</table>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 13: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>çûn</span>» di Dema <span class=SpellE>Borî</span> de</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>çûn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>borî</span> de <span class=SpellE>nederbaz</span>
e: <span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>çûm</span>, <span
class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>çûyî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>çû</span>, <span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span
class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>çûn</span>. Di <span class=SpellE>niha</span>
de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>diçim</span>, <span
class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>diçî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>diçe</span>, <span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span
class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>diçin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>go&#351;tina</span> <span class=SpellE>mebestê</span> <span
class=SpellE>rêwîtiyê</span>: «Ez ê <span class=SpellE>herim</span> [<span
class=SpellE>cih</span>]». <span class=SpellE>Navdêrên</span> <span
class=SpellE>bajar</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>pa&#351;gira</span>
«-ê» an «-<span class=SpellE>yê</span>» <span class=SpellE>tên</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Amûrên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>rêwîtiyê</span>: bi <span
class=SpellE>balafirê</span>, bi <span class=SpellE>trênê</span>, bi <span
class=SpellE>otobûsê</span>, bi <span class=SpellE>erebeyê</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Cihên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>girîng</span> li <span
class=SpellE>Îsraêlê</span>: <span class=SpellE>Ûr&#351;elîm</span>, Tel <span
class=SpellE>Avîv</span>, <span class=SpellE>Hayfayê</span>, <span
class=SpellE>Tiberyas</span>, <span class=SpellE>Naseretê</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1463;&#1495;&#1465;&#1491;&#1462;&#1513;&#1473;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Me'anyen</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#2E7D32'>!
Kama ole <span class=SpellE>&#351;xar</span> <span class=SpellE>hadira</span> <span
class=SpellE>&#351;elxa</span> <span class=SpellE>laxode&#351;</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Doron: </b><span class=SpellE>Sê</span> <span
class=SpellE>hezar</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;ekelê</span>. Ne <span
class=SpellE>erzan</span> e, <span class=SpellE>lê</span> <span class=SpellE>bajarê</span>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 14: <span class=SpellE>Navdêrên</span>
<span class=SpellE>Malê</span> û <span class=SpellE>Jimarên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Rêzê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Navdêrên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>odeyên</span> <span class=SpellE>malê</span>:
<span class=SpellE>jûra</span> <span class=SpellE>razanê</span>, salon, <span
class=SpellE>mitbah</span>, <span class=SpellE>hemam</span>, <span
class=SpellE>karbidestxane</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Jimarên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>rêzê</span>: <span class=SpellE>yekem</span>,
<span class=SpellE>duyem</span>, <span class=SpellE>sêyem</span>, <span
class=SpellE>çarem</span>, <span class=SpellE>pêncemîn</span>, <span
class=SpellE>&#351;e&#351;em</span>, <span class=SpellE>heftê</span>, <span
class=SpellE>he&#351;tê</span>, <span class=SpellE>nehê</span>, <span
class=SpellE>dehê</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de <span class=SpellE>jimarên</span> <span class=SpellE>rêzê</span>: </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1512;&#1460;&#1488;&#1513;&#1473;&#1493;&#1465;&#1503;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>yekem</span>), </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1461;&#1473;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>duyem</span>), </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1456;&#1473;&#1500;&#1460;&#1497;&#1513;&#1460;&#1473;&#1497;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>sêyem</span>), </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1512;&#1456;&#1489;&#1460;&#1497;&#1506;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>çarem</span>).</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>«Li <span class=SpellE>çend</span>
<span class=SpellE>katê</span> <span class=SpellE><span class=GramE>dijî</span></span><span
class=GramE>?»</span> — <span class=SpellE>bersiv</span>: «Ez li kata <span
class=SpellE>sêyem</span> <span class=SpellE>dijim</span>». Di <span
class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de: «</span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1456;&#1468;<span class=SpellE>&#1488;&#1461;&#1497;&#1494;&#1462;&#1492;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1511;&#1493;&#1465;&#1502;&#1464;&#1492;</span><span style='font-size:
11.0pt'> </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1514;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span class=GramE><span style='font-size:11.0pt;
mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1490;&#1464;&#1468;&#1512;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>?»</span></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Spartek</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1513;&#1497;&#1506;&#1493;&#1512;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwerzên</b></span><b> <span
class=SpellE>wergêranê</span>: Van <span class=SpellE>hevokên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
<span class=SpellE>wergerînin</span>.</b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo16'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>1.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Mala min <span class=SpellE>mezin</span> e.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo16'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>2.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Du <span class=SpellE>odeyên</span> me <span class=SpellE>hene</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 15: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>zanîn</span>» û <span class=SpellE>Peyvên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Teknolojiyê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>zanîn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
<span class=SpellE>dizanim</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span
class=SpellE>dizanî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>dizane</span>,
<span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>dizanin</span>. <span class=SpellE>Neyînî</span>: <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>nizanim</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span>
<span class=SpellE>nizanî</span>.</span></p>

class=SpellE>sepa</span>, <span class=SpellE>&#351;ebeke</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 17: <span class=SpellE>Destpêkirina</span>
<span class=SpellE>Hevalbend</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1502;&#1505;&#1497;&#1489;&#1493;&#1514;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1493;&#1488;&#1497;&#1512;&#1493;&#1506;&#1497;&#1501;</span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Selin: </b>Tu <span class=SpellE>êdî</span> <span
class=SpellE>amade</span> <span class=SpellE>yî</span> ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>cejnê</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1514;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1493;&#1468;&#1499;&#1464;&#1503;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1500;&#1463;&#1495;&#1458;&#1490;&#1460;&#1497;&#1490;&#1464;&#1492;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ata <span class=SpellE>muxan</span> <span class=SpellE>laxagiga</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Matan: </b><span class=SpellE>Erê</span>! Li <span
class=SpellE>ku</span> ye <span class=SpellE>cejna</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 16: Dema <span
class=SpellE>Pê&#351;erojê</span> û <span class=SpellE>Gotinên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Pîrozkirinê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Dema <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span>
bi «ê» <span class=SpellE>pi&#351;tî</span> <span class=SpellE>cînavkê</span> <span
class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>çêkirin</span>: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
ê <span class=SpellE>bêm</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> ê <span
class=SpellE>bêyî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> ê <span class=SpellE>bê</span>,
<span class=SpellE>em</span> ê <span class=SpellE>bêin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Gotinên</span></span><span

<span class=GramE>be!,</span> Roja <span class=SpellE>bûyinê</span> <span
class=SpellE>te</span> <span class=SpellE>pîroz</span> <span class=GramE>be!,</span>
Bi <span class=SpellE>xêr</span> <span class=GramE>be!,</span> <span
class=SpellE>Serkeftin</span>!</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 18: <span class=SpellE>Bawerî</span> û

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Jiyan: </b>Di <span class=SpellE>Cihûtiyê</span> de <span
class=SpellE>&#350;abat</span> <span class=SpellE>çi</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>
<span class=SpellE>wateya</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span

lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1463;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1463;&#1468;&#1513;&#1456;&#1473;&#1502;&#1464;&#1506;&#1493;&#1468;&#1514;</span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1513;&#1463;&#1468;&#1473;&#1489;&#1464;&#1468;&#1514;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1463;&#1468;&#1497;&#1463;&#1468;&#1492;&#1458;&#1491;&#1493;&#1468;&#1514;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ma <span class=SpellE>ma&#351;ma'ut</span> <span
class=SpellE>ha&#351;abat</span> <span class=SpellE>bayahadut</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Yael: </b><span class=SpellE>&#350;abat</span> <span
class=SpellE>roja</span> <span class=SpellE>pîroziya</span> <span class=SpellE>hefteyan</span>
e. Ji <span class=SpellE>Înê</span> <span class=SpellE>heta</span> <span
class=SpellE>&#350;emiyê</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1463;&#1473;&#1489;&#1464;&#1468;&#1514;</span><span

lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1513;&#1456;&#1468;&#1473;&#1489;&#1493;&#1468;&#1506;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>. </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1463;&#1490;&#1460;&#1468;&#1497;&#1506;&#1463;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1460;&#1497;&#1468;&#1493;&#1465;&#1501;</span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1513;&#1460;&#1473;&#1497;&#1513;&#1460;&#1468;&#1473;&#1497;</span><span
