<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span class=SpellE><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>&#350;abat</span></i></span><i><span style='color:#2E7D32'>
hi <span class=SpellE>yom</span> <span class=SpellE>hamenua</span> <span
class=SpellE>ha&#351;vu'i</span>. <span class=SpellE>Magi'a</span> <span
class=SpellE>miyom</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;i&#351;</span> <span
class=SpellE>ad</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;abat</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Jiyan: </span></b><span
lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'>Malbat di &#350;abatê de çi dikin?<o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1463;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1460;&#1468;&#1513;&#1456;&#1473;&#1508;&#1464;&#1468;&#1495;&#1493;&#1465;&#1514;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1506;&#1493;&#1465;&#1513;&#1474;&#1493;&#1465;&#1514;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 17: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>kirin</span>» û <span class=SpellE>Peyvên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Olî</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>kirin</span>» (<span
class=SpellE>dikim</span>) <span class=SpellE>yek</span> ji <span class=SpellE>lêkerên</span>
<span class=SpellE>herî</span> <span class=SpellE>gelemperî</span> <span
class=SpellE>yên</span> <span class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> ye. Di <span
class=SpellE>niha</span> de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikim</span>,
<span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>dikî</span>, <span
class=SpellE>ew</span> dike, <span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span

style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Di borî de: min kir, te kir,
wî/wê kir, me/we/wan kir.</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Di
navê olî de gelek peyvên Erebî an Îbranî hatine: nimêj, Kuran, Têwrat,
&#350;abat.</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span lang=DE style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-ansi-language:DE'>Lêkera
«kirin» bi navdêran re lêkerên pêxatî çêdike: nimêj kirin, dua kirin, xebat
kirin.</span><span lang=DE style='mso-ansi-language:DE'><o:p></o:p></span></p>

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 19: <span class=SpellE>Muzîk</span> û

<h2><span class=SpellE>Diyalog</span> / <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1491;&#1497;&#1488;&#1500;&#1493;&#1490;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Azîn</b></span><b>: </b>Tu <span
class=SpellE>muzîkê</span> <span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1514;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1493;&#1465;&#1492;&#1461;&#1489;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1493;&#1468;&#1505;&#1460;&#1497;&#1511;&#1464;&#1492;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ata <span class=SpellE>ohev</span> <span class=SpellE>musika</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Lior: </b><span class=SpellE>Erê</span>, pir! Ez <span
class=SpellE>gîtarê</span> <span class=SpellE>dixwazim</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>.</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1499;&#1461;&#1468;&#1503;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>, </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1488;&#1465;&#1491;</span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>! </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1504;&#1463;&#1490;&#1461;&#1468;&#1503;</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'> </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL
style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1490;&#1460;&#1468;&#1497;&#1496;&#1464;&#1512;&#1464;&#1492;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ken, <span class=SpellE>me'od</span>! Ani <span
class=SpellE>menagen</span> <span class=SpellE>gitara</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Azîn</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Stranên</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> <span
class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikî</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1456;&#1468;&#1506;&#1460;&#1489;&#1456;&#1512;&#1460;&#1497;&#1514;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ata <span class=SpellE>ohev</span> <span class=SpellE>&#351;irim</span>
<span class=SpellE>be'&#304;vrit</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Lior: </b><span class=SpellE>Erê</span>, <span
class=SpellE>lê</span> <span class=SpellE>hîn</span> <span class=SpellE>fêr</span>
<span class=SpellE>dibim</span>. <span class=SpellE>Hunerê</span> din <span
class=SpellE>jî</span> <span class=SpellE>hezdikevim</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span><span

lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'>. </span><span lang=HE dir=RTL

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ken, aval ani od <span class=SpellE>lomed</span>. Ani gam
<span class=SpellE>ohev</span> <span class=SpellE>amanuyot</span> <span
class=SpellE>axerot</span>.</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Azîn</b></span><b>: </b><span
class=SpellE>Wêne</span> <span class=SpellE>xwe&#351;</span> <span
class=SpellE>dikê&#351;î</span>?</p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><span dir=RTL></span><span
lang=AR-SA dir=RTL style='color:#264F78'><span dir=RTL></span>?</span><span
lang=HE dir=RTL style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1463;&#1514;&#1464;&#1468;&#1492;</span><span

style='color:#264F78;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1510;&#1463;&#1497;&#1464;&#1468;&#1512;</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span
style='color:#2E7D32'>Ata <span class=SpellE>tsayar</span>?</span></i></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Lior: </b><span class=SpellE>Piçek</span>. Mêvanxaneya <span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 18: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>kirin</span>» û <span
class=SpellE>Gotinên</span> <span class=SpellE>Tercîhê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>«Hez <span class=SpellE>kirin</span>»
<span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>wateya</span> «<span
class=SpellE>hezdikevim</span>». <span class=SpellE>Avahiya</span> <span
class=SpellE>wê</span>: «Ez ji [<span class=SpellE>ti&#351;t</span>/<span
class=SpellE>kes</span>] <span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikim</span>».
<span class=SpellE>Neyînî</span>: «Ez ji [<span class=SpellE>ti&#351;t</span>] <span
class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>nakim</span>».</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Dema <span class=SpellE>niha</span>:
<span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikim</span>,
<span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikî</span>,
<span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>hez</span> dike, <span
class=SpellE>em</span>/<span class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span>
<span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikin</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>tercîhê</span>: «Ez [A] ji [B] <span class=SpellE>bêtir</span>
<span class=SpellE>hez</span> <span class=SpellE>dikim</span>». Di <span
class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de: «</span><span class=SpellE><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1458;&#1504;&#1460;&#1497;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:
11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1502;&#1456;&#1506;&#1463;&#1491;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1460;&#1468;<span class=SpellE>&#1497;&#1507;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>... </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1506;&#1463;&#1500;</span><span style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1508;&#1456;&#1468;<span
class=SpellE>&#1504;&#1461;&#1497;</span></span><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>...»</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Navdêrên</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>hunerê</span>: <span class=SpellE>hunermend</span>,
<span class=SpellE>wêne</span>, <span class=SpellE>peyker</span>, <span
class=SpellE>&#351;ano</span>, <span class=SpellE>konserto</span>, <span
class=SpellE>sergi</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:6.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 19: <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span>
«<span class=SpellE>bûn</span>» di Dema <span class=SpellE>Borî</span> de</span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Lêkera</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>bûn</span>» di <span
class=SpellE>dema</span> <span class=SpellE>borî</span> de: <span class=SpellE>ez</span>
<span class=SpellE>bûm</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span> <span class=SpellE>bûyî</span>,
<span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>bû</span>, <span class=SpellE>em</span>/<span
class=SpellE>hûn</span>/<span class=SpellE>ew</span> <span class=SpellE>bûn</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>civakî</span>
û <span class=SpellE>siyasî</span> de <span class=SpellE>peyvên</span> <span
class=SpellE>girîng</span>: <span class=SpellE>hilbijartin</span>, <span
class=SpellE>welatî</span>, <span class=SpellE>maf</span>, <span class=SpellE>zagone</span>,
<span class=SpellE>hukumet</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Avahiya</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> <span class=SpellE>hevoka</span> <span class=SpellE>pêwendî</span>:
«Em <span class=SpellE>hêvî</span> <span class=SpellE>dikin</span> <span
class=SpellE>ku</span> <span class=SpellE>a&#351;tî</span> were» — «ê + <span
class=SpellE>lêker</span>» ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
de: </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1456;&#1468;&#1495;&#1460;&#1497;&#1512;&#1493;&#1465;&#1514;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>hilbijartin</span>), </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1499;&#1456;&#1468;&#1504;&#1462;&#1505;&#1462;&#1514;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>parlamento</span>), </span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1512;&#1465;&#1488;&#1513;&#1473;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:
HE'>&#1492;&#1463;&#1502;&#1462;&#1468;&#1502;&#1456;&#1513;&#1464;&#1473;&#1500;&#1464;&#1492;</span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> (<span class=SpellE>serokwezîr</span>).</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:6.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;

<p class=MsoNormal align=right style='margin-top:0cm;margin-right:18.0pt;
margin-bottom:5.0pt;margin-left:0cm;text-align:right'><i><span

<p class=MsoNormal><b>Rojan: </b>Rast e. <span class=SpellE>&#350;iyana</span> <span

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:8.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:4.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'>Rêzimana</span></b></span><b><span style='font-size:13.0pt;
color:#1F4E79'> <span class=SpellE>Be&#351;ê</span> 20: Dema <span
class=SpellE>Pê&#351;erojê</span> û <span class=SpellE>Xelaskirina</span> <span
class=SpellE>Zanînê</span></span></b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Dema <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span>
bi «ê»: <span class=SpellE>ez</span> ê <span class=SpellE>biçim</span>, <span
class=SpellE>tu</span> ê <span class=SpellE>bêyî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span>
ê <span class=SpellE>bibe</span>, <span class=SpellE>em</span> ê <span
class=SpellE>bikin</span>. <span class=SpellE>Lêkera</span> «<span
class=SpellE>bûn</span>» di <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span> de: <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> ê <span class=SpellE>bibim</span>, <span class=SpellE>tu</span>
ê <span class=SpellE>bibî</span>, <span class=SpellE>ew</span> ê <span
class=SpellE>bibe</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#351;ertê</span>: «<span class=SpellE>heger</span>/ger» <span
class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>lêkera</span> <span class=SpellE>kilasîk</span>:
«Heger <span class=SpellE>ez</span> <span class=SpellE>bixwînim</span>, <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> ê <span class=SpellE>fêr</span> <span class=SpellE>bibim</span>».
Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de: «</span><span class=SpellE><span
style='font-size:11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1460;&#1501;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> </span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:
11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1462;&#1500;&#1456;&#1502;&#1463;&#1491;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>, </span><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:
11.0pt;mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1488;&#1462;&#1510;&#1456;&#1500;&#1463;&#1495;</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'>».</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Peyva</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> «<span class=SpellE>dibe</span> <span class=SpellE>ku</span>»
<span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>wateya</span> «<span
class=SpellE>belkî</span>». Di <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> de: «<span
class=SpellE>&#1488;&#1493;&#1468;&#1500;&#1463;&#1497;</span>» = <span
class=SpellE>dibe</span> <span class=SpellE>ku</span>.</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal style='margin-top:3.0pt;margin-right:0cm;margin-bottom:3.0pt;
margin-left:0cm'><span class=SpellE><span style='font-size:11.0pt'>Kurmancî</span></span><span
style='font-size:11.0pt'> û <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span> — du <span
class=SpellE>zimanên</span> <span class=SpellE>zindî</span> û <span
class=SpellE>dewlemend</span>. <span class=SpellE>Hînbûna</span> her du <span
class=SpellE>zimanan</span> <span class=SpellE>deriyên</span> <span
class=SpellE>çandî</span> û <span class=SpellE>mirovî</span> <span
class=SpellE>vedikin</span>. <span class=SpellE>Bidomine</span> <span
class=SpellE>fêrbûnê</span>!</span></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Spartek</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1513;&#1497;&#1506;&#1493;&#1512;&#1497;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal><span class=SpellE><b>Rêwerzên</b></span><b> <span
class=SpellE>wergêranê</span>: Van <span class=SpellE>hevokên</span> <span
class=SpellE>Kurmancî</span> <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>Îbranî</span>
<span class=SpellE>wergerînin</span>.</b></p>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>1.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span>Di <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span> de <span
class=SpellE>ez</span> ê <span class=SpellE>nivîskar</span> <span class=SpellE>bibim</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>2.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span><span class=SpellE>Hêviyên</span> min <span class=SpellE>mezin</span>
in.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>3.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span><span class=SpellE>Xewneke</span> min <span class=SpellE>heye</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>4.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span><span class=SpellE>Armanca</span> min <span class=SpellE>zanîngeh</span>
e.</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>5.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span
dir=LTR></span><span class=SpellE>Bi</span> <span class=SpellE>serfiraziyê</span>,
<span class=SpellE>heval</span>!</p>

<p class=MsoListParagraph style='margin-left:36.0pt;text-indent:-18.0pt;
mso-list:l1 level1 lfo22'><![if !supportLists]><span style='mso-list:Ignore'>6.<span
style='font:7.0pt "Times New Roman"'>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span><![endif]><span

<h1><span class=SpellE>Be&#351;</span> 22: 100 <span class=SpellE>Lêkerên</span>
<span class=SpellE>Herî</span> <span class=SpellE>Gelemper</span> î <span
class=SpellE>Ibranî</span> / 100 <span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1508;&#1506;&#1500;&#1497;&#1501;</span>
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1492;&#1504;&#1508;&#1493;&#1510;&#1497;&#1501;</span>
<span style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1497;&#1493;&#1514;&#1512;</span> <span
style='mso-bidi-language:HE'>&#1489;&#1506;&#1489;&#1512;&#1497;&#1514;</span></h1>

<p class=MsoNormal><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p>

<h2>100 <span class=SpellE>Lêkerên</span> <span class=SpellE>Sereke</span> /
100 <span class=SpellE>&#1508;&#1506;&#1500;&#1497;&#1501;</span> <span
class=SpellE>&#1489;&#1505;&#1497;&#1505;&#1497;&#1497;&#1501;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal>Di <span class=SpellE>vê</span> <span class=SpellE>tabloyê</span>
de, <span class=SpellE>hûn</span> ê 100 <span class=SpellE>lêkerên</span> <span
class=SpellE>herî</span> <span class=SpellE>gelemperî</span> <span
class=SpellE>Ibranî</span> <span class=SpellE>bibînin</span>. Her <span
class=SpellE>lêker</span> <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>mastar</span>
(infinitive), <span class=SpellE>demê</span> <span class=SpellE>borî</span> <span
class=SpellE>êya</span> <span class=SpellE>yekem</span> <span class=SpellE>kes</span>,
<span class=SpellE>demê</span> <span class=SpellE>niha</span> (<span
class=SpellE>nêrê</span> <span class=SpellE>yekjimar</span>) û <span
class=SpellE>demê</span> <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;erojê</span> <span
class=SpellE>êya</span> <span class=SpellE>yekem</span> <span class=SpellE>kes</span>
<span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>dayîn</span>, <span
class=SpellE>ligel</span> <span class=SpellE>wergera</span> <span class=SpellE>Kurdî</span>.</p>

<h2><span class=SpellE>Notên</span> <span class=SpellE>Rêzimana</span> <span
class=SpellE>Lêkeran</span> / <span class=SpellE>&#1492;&#1506;&#1512;&#1493;&#1514;</span>
<span class=SpellE>&#1491;&#1511;&#1491;&#1493;&#1511;&#1497;&#1493;&#1514;</span></h2>

<p class=MsoNormal>• <span class=SpellE>Mastar</span> (Infinitive): Di Ibranî
de, <span class=SpellE>mastar</span> bi “lamed” (&#23629;) <span class=SpellE>dest</span>
<span class=SpellE>pê</span> dike, <span class=SpellE>w.m</span>. <span
class=SpellE>&#1500;&#1460;&#1499;&#1456;&#1514;&#1465;&#1489;</span> (<span
class=SpellE>nivîsîn</span>).</p>

<p class=MsoNormal>• Dema <span class=SpellE>Borî</span> (Past): Forma <span
class=SpellE>yekem</span> <span class=SpellE>kes</span> “<span class=SpellE>ez</span>”
bi “-<span class=SpellE>tî</span>” (&#1514;&#1460;) an “-î” (&#1497;) <span
class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>xelas</span> <span class=SpellE>kirin</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal>• Dema Niha (Present): Forma <span class=SpellE>nêrê</span> <span
class=SpellE>yekjimar</span> <span class=SpellE>tê</span> <span class=SpellE>dayîn</span>.
Ji <span class=SpellE>bo</span> <span class=SpellE>mê</span> an <span
class=SpellE>pirjimar</span>, <span class=SpellE>dengbirên</span> <span
class=SpellE>cuda</span> <span class=SpellE>hene</span>.</p>

<p class=MsoNormal>• Dema <span class=SpellE>Pê&#351;erojê</span> (Future):
Forma <span class=SpellE>yekem</span> <span class=SpellE>kes</span> “<span
class=SpellE>ez</span>” <span class=SpellE>bi</span> <span class=SpellE>pê&#351;gira</span>
“alef” (&#1488;) <span class=SpellE>dest</span> <span class=SpellE>pê</span>
dike.</p>
